load-pdf-list-acroform-fields.title: Load PDF and List AcroForm Fields
load-pdf-list-acroform-fields.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf, accessing its AcroForm, and enumerating the form fields along with their current values.

read-acroform-fields-from-pdf-stream.title: Read AcroForm Fields from a PDF Stream
read-acroform-fields-from-pdf-stream.description: Opens a PDF file as a read‑only stream, creates an Aspose.Pdf Document, and enumerates all AcroForm fields, printing each field's name and value without writing to disk.

retrieve-acroform-fields.title: Retrieve All AcroForm Fields from a PDF
retrieve-acroform-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm collection, and enumerate every form field, printing each field's full name and concrete type.

retrieve-pdf-form-field-by-name.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field by Name
retrieve-pdf-form-field-by-name.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access a specific form field using the Document.Form indexer, and display its basic properties.

iterate-pdf-pages-list-form-fields.title: Iterate PDF Pages to List Form Fields
iterate-pdf-pages-list-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through each page, retrieve the form fields in tab order, and print each field's name and type.

enumerate-pdf-form-fields-on-page.title: Enumerate PDF Form Fields on a Page
enumerate-pdf-form-fields-on-page.description: Loads a PDF, selects a specific page, and iterates through all form fields on that page, logging each field's name, type, and value.

read-checkbox-value-to-boolean.title: Read Checkbox Value and Convert to Boolean
read-checkbox-value-to-boolean.description: Shows how to read the Value property of a checkbox form field in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and convert the string value to a Boolean.

parse-update-numeric-pdf-form-field.title: Parse and Update Numeric PDF Form Field
parse-update-numeric-pdf-form-field.description: Shows how to read a numeric form field from a PDF, convert its text value to a decimal, perform a calculation, and write the result back to the field.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf, export its form fields to a JSON string using Form.ExportToJson, and display the result.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v2.title: Export PDF Form Data to UTF-8 JSON File
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v2.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all form fields, and write them to a UTF‑8 encoded JSON file.

export-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
export-pdf-form-fields-to-xml.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with form fields using Aspose.Pdf and export the document model, including the form data, to an XML file.

export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
export-pdf-form-data-to-fdf.description: Shows how to extract all form field values from a PDF and write them to an FDF file using Aspose.Pdf's Form facade with a FileStream.

export-acroform-fields-to-xfdf.title: Export AcroForm Fields to XFDF
export-acroform-fields-to-xfdf.description: Loads a PDF containing AcroForm fields and exports those fields to an XFDF file using a FileStream.

export-pdf-to-html-png-xfdf.title: Export PDF to HTML, PNG, and XFDF with Stream Disposal
export-pdf-to-html-png-xfdf.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and exports the entire document to HTML, the first page to a PNG image, and all annotations to an XFDF file, each operation using a FileStream that is closed after use.

modify-checkbox-appearance-extract-value.title: Modify Checkbox Appearance and Extract Value
modify-checkbox-appearance-extract-value.description: Loads a PDF, finds the first checkbox form field, draws a custom rectangle over it using Aspose.Pdf.Drawing, and then reads the checkbox's value.

extract-pdf-form-fields.title: Extract PDF Form Fields to Dictionary
extract-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its form fields, and return a dictionary mapping each field's full name to its string value.

extract-pdf-form-data-to-json.title: Extract PDF Form Data to JSON Files
extract-pdf-form-data-to-json.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a directory, load each with Aspose.Pdf, and export its form fields to a corresponding JSON file.

combine-pdf-form-data-into-json-array.title: Combine PDF Form Data into a Single JSON Array
combine-pdf-form-data-into-json-array.description: Shows how to load several PDF files, export each form's fields to JSON using Aspose.Pdf, and merge the results into one JSON array for batch processing.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v3.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v3.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and export its form fields to a JSON file via a command‑line utility.

log-pdf-form-extraction-timestamps.title: Log PDF Form Extraction with Timestamps
log-pdf-form-extraction-timestamps.description: Shows how to extract text from PDF form XObjects using Aspose.Pdf and record start and finish timestamps in a log file.

extract-pdf-form-data-to-json-bytes.title: Extract PDF Form Data to JSON Bytes
extract-pdf-form-data-to-json-bytes.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export its form fields to JSON, and return the JSON as a byte array using a MemoryStream.

export-pdf-form-fields-with-prefix-to-js.title: Export PDF Form Fields with Specific Prefix to JSON
export-pdf-form-fields-with-prefix-to-js.description: Loads a PDF, filters form fields whose names start with a given prefix, and writes the field names and values to an indented JSON file.

count-acroform-fields-in-pdf.title: Count AcroForm Fields in PDF
count-acroform-fields-in-pdf.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and retrieves the total number of AcroForm fields via Document.Form.Count.

iterate-and-fill-pdf-form-fields.title: Iterate and Fill PDF Form Fields
iterate-and-fill-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to loop through each form field in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read its current value, and set a default value when the field is empty.

retrieve-form-field-types-from-pdf.title: Retrieve Form Field Types from PDF
retrieve-form-field-types-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its form fields, and obtain each field's .NET runtime type via GetType() for classification.

export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v4.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON via FileStream
export-pdf-form-data-to-json__v4.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its form, and export all form fields directly to a JSON file using a FileStream.

export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-memorystream.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML using MemoryStream
export-pdf-form-data-to-xml-memorystream.description: Demonstrates how to export form fields from a PDF directly into a MemoryStream as XML using Aspose.Pdf's Form.ExportXml method.

export-pdf-form-to-fdf.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
export-pdf-form-to-fdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's Form facade to export PDF form fields to an FDF file and ensure the stream and form are closed.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF using a FileStream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF document to an XFDF file using Aspose.Pdf's ExportAnnotationsToXfdf method and a FileStream.

log-form-field-count-per-pdf-page.title: Log Form Field Count per PDF Page
log-form-field-count-per-pdf-page.description: Shows how to iterate through each page of a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, count the widget annotations (form fields) on the page, and log the number for monitoring purposes.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF to Individual SVG Files
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Shows how to scan each page of a PDF, detect vector graphics, and export every graphic as a separate SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-vector-graphics-to-svg__v2.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG Files
extract-vector-graphics-to-svg__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF, validate a page, and use Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor to save each vector graphic on that page as an individual SVG file.

combine-pdf-vector-graphics-into-svg.title: Combine PDF Vector Graphics into a Single SVG
combine-pdf-vector-graphics-into-svg.description: Loads a PDF, extracts vector graphics from each page using Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor, removes the outer <svg> tags, wraps each fragment in a <g> element, and writes a combined multi‑page SVG file.

extract-subpaths-png-graphicsabsorber.title: Extract Subpaths as PNG Images Using GraphicsAbsorber
extract-subpaths-png-graphicsabsorber.description: Creates a sample PDF with vector shapes, uses GraphicsAbsorber to capture each graphic element, converts each element to SVG and then renders it to an individual PNG file.

export-pdf-page-as-raster-png.title: Export PDF Page as Raster PNG with Specified DPI
export-pdf-page-as-raster-png.description: Demonstrates how to rasterize a PDF page, including all vector graphics, into a PNG image at a given DPI using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-graphic-element-to-svg.title: Extract Specific Graphic Element from PDF and Save as SVG
extract-graphic-element-to-svg.description: Demonstrates how to absorb graphic elements from a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf, select one by its index, and export the chosen element as an SVG file.

extract-first-page-text-to-utf8.title: Extract First Page Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
extract-first-page-text-to-utf8.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting the text from its first page using TextAbsorber, and saving the result to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-txt.title: Extract Text from PDF to TXT
extract-text-from-pdf-to-txt.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all pages' text using TextAbsorber, and write the concatenated result to a plain .txt file.

extract-stamp-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Stamp Annotation Text from PDF
extract-stamp-text-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages and annotations, extracts the visible text of any stamp annotations, and writes the collected strings to a JSON array.

extract-superscripts-subscripts-from-pdf.title: Extract Superscripts and Subscripts from PDF
extract-superscripts-subscripts-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, analyze font size and baseline positions to identify superscript and subscript fragments, and write the results to a text file.

extract-paragraphs-with-line-breaks.title: Extract Paragraphs with Line Breaks from PDF
extract-paragraphs-with-line-breaks.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to absorb paragraph structures from a PDF, preserve line breaks, and write the extracted text to a UTF‑8 .txt file.

extract-embedded-images-to-png.title: Extract Embedded Images from PDF to PNG
extract-embedded-images-to-png.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's image resources, and save each embedded image as a PNG file in an output folder.

extract-fonts-from-pdf.title: Extract Fonts from PDF and Save as TTF Files
extract-fonts-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, retrieve all embedded fonts, and export each font to a .ttf file in a specified output directory.

extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.title: Extract PDF Tables to CSV Files
extract-pdf-tables-to-csv.description: Demonstrates how to detect tables in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber, iterate through rows and cells, and export each table as a separate CSV file.

export-pdf-acroform-fields-to-json.title: Export PDF AcroForm Fields to JSON
export-pdf-acroform-fields-to-json.description: Loads a PDF document, extracts all AcroForm field names and values, and writes them to a JSON file using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
batch-extract-vector-graphics-to-svg.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through PDF files in a folder, detect pages with vector graphics, and export each page's graphics as separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

parallel-pdf-text-extraction.title: Parallel PDF Text Extraction with TPL
parallel-pdf-text-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from multiple PDF files concurrently using the Task Parallel Library and Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber, storing results in a thread‑safe collection.

export-pdf-to-svg-with-custom-options.title: Export PDF to SVG with Custom Options and CSS Styling
export-pdf-to-svg-with-custom-options.description: Demonstrates exporting a PDF to SVG using SvgSaveOptions (DPI scaling and multithreading) and extracting page vector graphics with SvgExtractionOptions, then injecting custom CSS into the resulting SVG files.

export-large-graphics-from-pdf.title: Export Large Graphics from PDF as SVG
export-large-graphics-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, filters graphic elements by bounding rectangle area, and exports each qualifying graphic to a separate SVG file.

extract-page-graphics-to-svg.title: Extract Page Graphics to SVG Using GraphicsAbsorber
extract-page-graphics-to-svg.description: Demonstrates how to collect graphic elements from selected PDF pages with GraphicsAbsorber and convert them to SVG using SvgExtractor.

combine-pdfs-into-multi-page-svg.title: Combine Multiple PDFs into a Single Multi‑Page SVG
combine-pdfs-into-multi-page-svg.description: Loads several PDF files, extracts each page as SVG fragments with Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor, and merges the fragments into one multi‑page SVG document.

export-pdf-subpaths-as-separate-svg.title: Export PDF Subpaths as Separate SVG Images
export-pdf-subpaths-as-separate-svg.description: Shows how to extract each graphic subpath from PDF pages and save them as individual SVG files with transparent backgrounds using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-vector-graphics-from-encrypted-p.title: Extract Vector Graphics from Encrypted PDF to SVG
extract-vector-graphics-from-encrypted-p.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF by supplying a password, then extract each page as a separate SVG file to preserve vector graphics.

extract-pdf-text-image-graphic-count.title: Extract PDF Text Length, Image and Graphic Counts
extract-pdf-text-image-graphic-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the total text length, and count images and XObject graphics (forms) across all pages.

extract-pdf-font-table-form-counts.title: Extract Font, Table, and Form Field Counts from PDF
extract-pdf-font-table-form-counts.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and log the number of fonts, tables, and form fields present in each document.

validate-pdf-fonts-against-system.title: Validate PDF Fonts Against System Installation
validate-pdf-fonts-against-system.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages, checks each referenced font to see if it is installed on the system, and reports any missing fonts.

extract-pdf-metadata-to-svg.title: Extract PDF Metadata and Convert Pages to SVG
extract-pdf-metadata-to-svg.description: Reads a PDF, saves its title and author to a text file, and exports each page as an SVG vector representation.

extract-images-using-graphicsabsorber.title: Extract PDF Images with GraphicsAbsorber and Save as JPEG
extract-images-using-graphicsabsorber.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's GraphicsAbsorber to collect only image elements from each PDF page, locate their placement, render the page, crop the images, and export them as JPEG files.

convert-pdf-to-markdown-preserve-indenta.title: Convert PDF to Markdown While Preserving Paragraph Indentation
convert-pdf-to-markdown-preserve-indenta.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, processing its paragraphs to retain indentation, and saving the content as a formatted Markdown file.

extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript Text from PDF
extract-superscript-subscript-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over text fragments, detect superscript or subscript formatting, and wrap the extracted text with Unicode markers.

export-pdf-tables-to-csv-with-border-mar.title: Export PDF Tables to CSV with Border Markers
export-pdf-tables-to-csv-with-border-mar.description: Demonstrates extracting tables from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, adding visual border markers to each cell, and exporting the result to a CSV file.

extract-checkbox-states-from-pdf-acrofor.title: Extract Checkbox States from PDF AcroForm
extract-checkbox-states-from-pdf-acrofor.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its AcroForm fields, collects the checked state of each checkbox, and outputs the results as a JSON boolean array.

extract-selected-radio-button-values.title: Extract Selected Radio Button Values and Labels from PDF Forms
extract-selected-radio-button-values.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its form fields, identify radio button fields, and retrieve both the selected export value and the visible label of the chosen option.

extract-svg-brand-color-transformation.title: Extract SVG Vector Graphics and Apply Brand Color
extract-svg-brand-color-transformation.description: Shows how to extract vector graphics from PDF pages as SVG, replace a specific color with a brand color, and save the transformed SVG files.

preserve-pdf-coordinate-system-to-svg.title: Preserve PDF Coordinate System When Converting to SVG
preserve-pdf-coordinate-system-to-svg.description: Demonstrates converting each PDF page and the whole document to SVG while keeping the original PDF user space coordinate system using Aspose.Pdf's TrySaveVectorGraphics and SvgSaveOptions with ScaleToPixels disabled.
